typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	p_directory as string,
	p_filename as string
}
source(output(
		FIWPOBID as string,
		FIWPUID as string,
		PROJECT as string,
		NAME as string,
		DESCRIPTION as string,
		PURPOSE as string,
		DISCIPLINE as string,
		PLANNEDSTARTDATE as string,
		PLANNEDFINISHDATE as string,
		ACTUALSTARTDATE as string,
		ACTUALFINISHDATE as string,
		ESTIMATEDMANHOURS as string,
		PLANNEDMANHOURS as string,
		ACTUALMANHOURS as string,
		COMPLETEDMANHOURS as string,
		TOTALCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS as string,
		OPENCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS as string,
		STATUS as string,
		SCOPE as string,
		NOTES as string,
		CREWSIZE as string,
		CREWDURATION as string,
		EWPNUMBER as string,
		CONTRACT as string,
		CONTRACTOR as string,
		DESIGNAREA as string,
		FOREMAN as string,
		GENERALFOREMAN as string,
		FIELDENGINEER as string,
		SUPERINTENDENT as string,
		CREWOBID as string,
		CWPOBID as string,
		JOBNO as string,
		REVISION as string,
		IWPREVDATE as string,
		CREATIONUSER as string,
		source_code as string,
		sub_source_code as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	inferDriftedColumnTypes: true,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	wildcardPaths:[($p_directory+'/'+$p_filename+'_*.csv')]) ~> srcSPCStage
srcSPCStage derive(FIWPOBID = trim(replace(FIWPOBID, "\n", " ")),
		FIWPUID = trim(replace(FIWPUID, "\n", " ")),
		PROJECT = trim(replace(PROJECT, "\n", " ")),
		NAME = trim(replace(NAME, "\n", " ")),
		DESCRIPTION = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(DESCRIPTION, "\n", " "),"\r"," "),","," "),'"'," "),"  "," ")),
		PURPOSE = trim(replace(PURPOSE, "\n", " ")),
		DISCIPLINE = trim(replace(DISCIPLINE, "\n", " ")),
		PLANNEDSTARTDATE = trim(replace(PLANNEDSTARTDATE, "\n", " ")),
		PLANNEDFINISHDATE = trim(replace(PLANNEDFINISHDATE, "\n", " ")),
		ACTUALSTARTDATE = trim(replace(ACTUALSTARTDATE, "\n", " ")),
		ACTUALFINISHDATE = trim(replace(ACTUALFINISHDATE, "\n", " ")),
		ESTIMATEDMANHOURS = trim(replace(ESTIMATEDMANHOURS, "\n", " ")),
		PLANNEDMANHOURS = trim(replace(PLANNEDMANHOURS, "\n", " ")),
		ACTUALMANHOURS = trim(replace(ACTUALMANHOURS, "\n", " ")),
		COMPLETEDMANHOURS = trim(replace(COMPLETEDMANHOURS, "\n", " ")),
		TOTALCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS = trim(replace(TOTALCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS, "\n", " ")),
		OPENCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS = trim(replace(OPENCOMPONENTCONSTRAINTS, "\n", " ")),
		STATUS = trim(replace(STATUS, "\n", " ")),
		SCOPE = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(SCOPE, "\n", " "),"\r"," "),","," "),'"'," "),"  "," ")),
		NOTES = trim(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(SCOPE, "\n", " "),"\r"," "),","," "),'"'," "),"  "," ")),
		CREWSIZE = trim(replace(CREWSIZE, "\n", " ")),
		CREWDURATION = trim(replace(CREWDURATION, "\n", " ")),
		EWPNUMBER = trim(replace(EWPNUMBER, "\n", " ")),
		CONTRACTOR = trim(replace(CONTRACTOR, "\n", " ")),
		DESIGNAREA = trim(replace(DESIGNAREA, "\n", " ")),
		FOREMAN = trim(replace(FOREMAN, "\n", " ")),
		GENERALFOREMAN = trim(replace(GENERALFOREMAN, "\n", " ")),
		FIELDENGINEER = trim(replace(FIELDENGINEER, "\n", " ")),
		SUPERINTENDENT = trim(replace(SUPERINTENDENT, "\n", " ")),
		CREWOBID = trim(replace(CREWOBID, "\n", " ")),
		CWPOBID = trim(replace(CWPOBID, "\n", " ")),
		JOBNO = trim(replace(JOBNO, "\n", " ")),
		REVISION = trim(replace(REVISION, "\n", " ")),
		IWPREVDATE = trim(replace(IWPREVDATE, "\n", " ")),
		CREATIONUSER = trim(replace(CREATIONUSER, "\n", " ")),
		source_code = source_code,
		sub_source_code = sub_source_code,
		CONTRACT_Number = trim(substringIndex(CONTRACT,'-',1)),
		CONTRACT_description = trim(trim(dropLeft(CONTRACT,length(substringIndex(CONTRACT,'-',1))),'-')),
		File_Path = concat(trim($p_directory),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$p_filename,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		Column_1 as string,
		Column_2 as string,
		Column_3 as string,
		Column_4 as string,
		Column_5 as string,
		Column_6 as string,
		Column_7 as string,
		Column_8 as string,
		Column_9 as string,
		Column_10 as string,
		Column_11 as string,
		Column_12 as string,
		Column_13 as string,
		Column_14 as string,
		Column_15 as string,
		Column_16 as string,
		Column_17 as string,
		Column_18 as string,
		Column_19 as string,
		Column_20 as string,
		Column_21 as string,
		Column_22 as string,
		Column_23 as string,
		Column_24 as string
	),
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkSPCRaw
